mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM dept_tree
SELECT dept_id FROM sys_role_dept WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT dept_id FROM sys_role_dept WHERE role_id IN
#{roleId}

SELECT * FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND (id = #{deptId} OR ancestors LIKE ('%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%') OR ancestors LIKE (CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%') OR ancestors LIKE ('%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR))) ORDER BY parent_id, order_num
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET ancestors = REPLACE(ancestors, #{oldAncestors}, #{newAncestors}) WHERE ancestors LIKE (#{oldAncestors} || ',%')
mapper.select: SELECT dept_name FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
